name: mcp-server-aws-bedrock-kb-retrieval
description: Access and query Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases with natural language retrieval

rating.reason: Excellent documentation with comprehensive descriptions that explain functionality, usage context, and constraints. Tool names are clear and specific. Parameter documentation is thorough with detailed explanations of purpose, constraints, and usage guidance. The descriptions include helpful examples, best practices, and multi-step usage instructions that proactively address user questions.
